decisions.rationale: IR and checkinApi.ts re-read confirm submitDailyCheckIn computes streak from onboarding_data dates even when tryInsertCheckinTable succeeds (lines 188–190). This is a latent bug in the forward-looking insert branch, but the active brownfield runtime path always hits !inserted because frontend/supabase has no dailycheckin table (implementation-policy read_only_context_paths). The fallback path appends today's row to onboarding_data before computeNextStreak, so FV-1/FV-2 and AC-3 pass in the prototype. A correct table-history query requires dailycheckin schema and cannot be validated in this wave; defer streak-from-table fix to the schema/backend wave when migrations land.

IR inventory confirms bTIXh parent_id ai_RNbBHXRh (sibling of ai_RNbBHXRi), while DashboardCheckinCard.tsx nests bTIXh inside ai_RNbBHXRi. ui_evidence is partial for hierarchy selectors only — bTIXh carries the correct data-bubble-id, binds live mood text per AC-2/FV-3, and layout is unchanged. bTIXh is not a standalone named ui_ref in decompose ui_refs[] (only ai_RNbBHXRh/ai_RNbBHXRi are). This matches the DASH-02 C-1 pattern: intermediate nesting parity-tooling polish that does not fail AC-2 or block DASH-05 depends_on.

Coverage preflight and criteria_audit AC-3 gap explicitly document client-side yesterday-continuation streak as intentional brownfield simplification versus Bubble bTIWG CancelScheduledAPIEvent/ScheduleAPIEvent bTIWr chain. implementation-policy adapter_when reserves multi-step scheduled orchestration for server-side work; AC-3 wording requires insert + streak badge refresh, not full deferred-reset API parity. computeNextStreak satisfies AC-3 and FV-2 in the prototype; bTIWr port belongs to a future backend/schema wave.

DashboardCheckinCard.tsx renders ai_RNbBHXRd only when streak > 0. Review ui_evidence marks ai_RNbBHXRd pass with note on conditional render; AC-1 requires the streak badge marker on the card tree, not unconditional visibility at zero. Showing a '0 day streak' badge or matching Bubble data-binding visibility is low-priority ui-fidelity polish that does not affect submit workflow or DASH-05 layout depends_on.

Bubble ai_RNbBHXRw workflow includes ResetInputs after ScheduleAPIEvent; React clears reflection and shows toast on success while retaining mood/energy slider values. No AC specifies post-submit input reset; FV-1/FV-3 pass with live slider binding intact. Retaining submitted slider values is reasonable React UX and aligns with the DASH-02 C-3 pattern of accepting intentional brownfield workflow simplification when ACs are satisfied.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 2 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 table-based streak query when dailycheckin schema lands; C-2 bTIXh sibling nesting under ai_RNbBHXRh as parity-tooling polish; C-4 zero-streak badge visibility. Accepted: C-3 simplified client streak vs bTIWG scheduled cancellation per documented brownfield scope; C-5 ResetInputs parity not required by AC.
